# Prakash Auto Honda

> Authorized Honda two-wheeler dealership serving Kamareddy district, Telangana, India since 2022.

## Business Overview

Prakash Auto Honda is the authorized Honda Motorcycle & Scooter India (HMSI) dealership in Kamareddy, Telangana. We are the only authorized Honda dealer in Kamareddy district, offering new Honda two-wheelers, an authorized service center, genuine spare parts, and vehicle finance assistance.

- **Type:** Authorized Honda Two-Wheeler Dealership
- **Brand:** Honda Motorcycle & Scooter India (HMSI)
- **Founded:** 2022
- **Branches:** 2 (Kamareddy Main + Lingampet)
- **Phone:** +91 8886604615
- **WhatsApp:** https://wa.me/918886604615
- **Website:** https://www.prakashautohonda.com
- **Address:** Kamareddy, Telangana 503111
- **Hours:** Monday–Saturday, 9 AM–7 PM

## Location & Service Area

**Main Showroom:** Hyderabad Road, Kamareddy, Telangana 503111 (near NH44)
**Branch:** Main Road, Lingampet

Serving riders across Kamareddy, Banswada, Yellareddy, Nizamsagar, Lingampet, Bibipet, Pitlam, Tadwai, Bheemgal, Domakonda, Varni, Sadasivanagar, Bhiknoor, and Machareddy.

## Honda Models Available

| Model | Type | Starting Price |
|-------|------|---------------|
| Honda Activa 110 | Scooter | ₹73,000 onwards |
| Honda Activa 125 | Premium Scooter | ₹95,000 onwards |
| Honda Dio 110 | Sporty Scooter | ₹75,000 onwards |
| Honda Dio 125 | Premium Sporty Scooter | ₹85,000 onwards |
| Honda Shine 100 | Commuter Bike | ₹74,000 onwards |
| Honda Shine 125 | Commuter Bike | ₹82,000 onwards |
| Honda SP 125 | Commuter Bike | ₹85,000 onwards |
| Honda SP 160 | Sports Commuter | ₹1,10,000 onwards |
| Honda Livo | Economy Bike | ₹76,000 onwards |
| Honda Unicorn | Premium Commuter | ₹1,08,000 onwards |
| Honda CB Hornet 125 | Sports Bike | ₹95,000 onwards |
| Honda Hornet 2.0 | Sports Bike | ₹1,35,000 onwards |
| Honda CB200X | Adventure Tourer | ₹1,52,000 onwards |

## Services Offered

- New Honda two-wheeler sales
- Authorized Honda service center (Honda-certified technicians)
- Genuine Honda spare parts
- Vehicle finance and EMI assistance (zero down payment on select models)
- Insurance assistance
- Free test rides
- WhatsApp-based support and service booking

## EMI Information

Easy EMI starting from ₹2,100/month. Zero down payment available on select models through HDFC, SBI, Bajaj Finance, and other partners.

## Customer Ratings

- Google Rating: 4.3/5 (500+ reviews)

## Competitors

Hero MotoCorp, TVS, Bajaj dealers in Kamareddy area.
